title: almcorp.com
summary:
Here are the most important distinct developments from the last 14 days (April 5 - April 19, 2026) concerning publishers' efforts to block, charge, or control AI crawlers:

*   **News Outlets Block Internet Archive Over AI Scraping Fears**
    Multiple major news organizations, including USA Today Co. (which owns over 200 media outlets) and The New York Times, are actively blocking the Internet Archive's Wayback Machine from archiving their content. This action stems from concerns that AI companies might use the archived material as an indirect route to train their models or extract text at sc
